---
title: "Coral del Mar Valle-Rodríguez"
subtitle: "EEB PhD Student"
image: /images/portraits/coral-valle-rodriguez.jpg
role: phd
weight: 5
aliases: ["Coral del Mar Valle Rodríguez", "Coral del Mar Valle-Rodríguez", "C.V.R.", "C. Valle-Rodríguez"]
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:cv273@cornell.edu"
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: "https://twitter.com/CoraldelMarVR"
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: "https://github.com/coraldelmarvr"
    - icon: record-circle
      text: ORCID
      href: "https://orcid.org/0009-0003-8440-583X"
---

I am highly interested in using remote sensing techniques to study changes in
forest composition and plant behavior due to climate change in the tropics.
